name: NIPPAN RENTAL Co.,Ltd.
summary: NIPPAN RENTAL Co.,Ltd. engages in the rental of construction machinery and vehicles in Japan. The company rents construction machinery for civil engineering and architecture, road equipment, cars, and other general-purpose machineries. It is also involved in the sale and repair of construction equipment. The company was founded in 1979 and is headquartered in Maebashi, Japan.
